name: Rioney
title: Demon from Gravedes
desc: Rioney is the oldest oc that I want to redesign. She was made as a group along with 5 others that mostly got redesigned already. Historically always one of my least favorites but I think her story is kinda cool. Shes a warlord in the outskirts of Gravedes that has an army of demons like her that just conquer shit. The mushroom hat is meant to be iconic but might need to be changed to fit a stronger outfit.

name: Than
title: Ruian from Faldwell
desc: Than is Shine's closest friend, followed by Cosh. Than identifies as male but has the power to change his sex to whatever he wants, whenever he wants. I don't like his colors more than anything else and wanna see him fit in some trendy gender neutral clothes.

name: Lumos
title: Wratih from Gravedes
desc: An oc that was clearly inspired by the Fiends from Miitopia. Her power is that touching a body part makes it grow, and shes addicted to attention and power. I want to make her design more distinct from her initial inspiration, somehow, and will probably enlarge her base proportions.

name: Vesper
title: Wasp from Sprunkhelm
desc: Vesper is based on a lazy output from a hollow knight OC generator app. I changed her once to be a wasp, while keeping the infection theme, which now is some sort of nectar that turns you hyper when you ingest it. Always one of my least favorite ocs, but has the potential to look cooler.

name: Nuii
title: Toy from Sprunkhelm
desc: Nuii was inspired by Sackboy and was made to fulfill an early form of a vore fetish. Shes able to unzip her chest and stuff anything inside of it, which makes her look bigger. I think her design can be cleaned up more.

name: Seneco
title: Human from Gravedes
desc: Seneco is an evil witch, sister of Mychrom, who has the power to steal size from people and add it to herself (or vice versa). Originally was designed with another character in mind, who I have now got rid of, so now she could use a more independent design. I may also change her species to not be human.

name: Nesel
title: Charzka from Borealis
desc: Nesel is a schitzophrenic lightning elemental that lives in the center of the big lightning storm across from Borealis. I think her design is okay as it is, but I made the mistake of taking away her balls.

name: Cupressa
title: Cactus from Jamasht
desc: Cupressa was initially inspired by the Boingsetta from PvZ2. Her reason for creation was limitless giantess growth, achieved through the second mouth on her tail that drinks water which causes the growth. I have since changed her species to be a cactus to be more in theme with that, but I want to redesign her to be less bland and include visuals that hint at her ability, like holding a jug of water or somthing.

name: Mychrom
title: Human from Domokovsky
desc: Mychrom, brother of Seneco, is an average looking male sorcerer that has the ability to not grow, but multiply the body parts of another person. He doesn't do it out of malice, more out of curiosity. I may also change his species to not be human.

name: Kefali
title: Dullahan from Ozafaeh
desc: Kefali was made to be a spooky dullahan and the twisted nurse theme came later. I don't like her design because its too similar to her inspiration which was Eve Silva Paragorica from LBP2. I want to add stuff like a giant scary needle in one arm and her severed head hanging from an IV rack or something instead of a cage. I also wanna make her more buff with a big of pudge.

name: Sinima
title: Moezian from Domokovsky
desc: Sinima is the third Moezian in the trio and the last one to get a redesign. She has the power of giant mirages of her own hands that she can control for combat. I want to polish her design and expemplify the hands a lot more, doing like a finger gun or something.

name: Alecto
title: Witch from Gravedes
desc: Alecto is the older sister to Nimbus. Right now shes sort of this evil witch that was jealous of nimbus' volutpuousness so she used magic to make herself bigger but it only made her taller while still being skinny. I want to change her to having anorexia along with the same height changing powers, so like her magic would make her grow infinitely proportional to the food she eats, but gets frustrated because she STILL cant pack on weight to her ass no matter how hard she tries. Im also going to change her gender from female to intersex.

name: Dexerai
title: Nudibranch from Wellingport
desc: Dexerai's concept was a deep sea nudibranch that can multiply her breasts and penises. I never liked her design that I had and want to try at it again, but I also want to change her gender to male because its funny and would make him the only boy with multiboob (also might give him stupidly long lashes).

name: Peepo
title: Gnome from Sprunkhelm
desc: I made Peepo, a little gremlin girl, when Neon made me play Final Fantasy 14. I thought her name was so funny that she had to be an OC. Her design is good enough for me right now, but I want to alter her pose slightly to show off more than just a head on top of some tits and a giant penis.

name: Echo
title: Bat from Ozafaeh
desc: Echo is a shy little bat girl that makes apparitions of people to be her friend because she can't make real connections on her own. I think her design is pretty good but I would like to change it to show her with one of the apparitions

name: Andromeda
title: Angel from Borealis
desc: Andromeda is Voe's younger sister. hher design was inspired by the fallen angels and the maddener from Cappella Magna in Vampire Survivors. She was made with the same powers as Lumos how she grows with being touched, except she differs because shes a female. i want to change her design to break away from the video game inspiration more and also give her way more things to wear so she isnt so bland

name: Rosella
title: Venus from Ozafaeh
desc: Rosella is the newest OC, and despite looking okay, I never liked her that much. Her thing is that she literally does not have a butt, just stalk. I was going to make her male, but I decided to instead reserve the busty boy honor for a future OC. I don't really know what I'm going to do to change her in a way that I like more.
